gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, watering the community garden and updating the app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee watering a digital garden of code-plants, representing the daily greenhouse and app metrics update.
